Programs

Train with Purpose.

Get Started
I
Adult Training

Strength and conditioning for adults at any level. Beat plateaus, build real strength, and move better than ever.

  • Functional Movement Screening
  • Custom program design
  • Competition prep
  • Return-from-injury programming
  • Group training options
Enlist Now →
II
Senior Fitness

Safe, effective resistance training at North Charleston Senior Centers. Stay strong, independent, and confident.

  • Low-impact options
  • Balance & coordination
  • Paced to your level
  • Group classes
  • Senior Center locations
Enlist Now →
III
Sport Performance

Pro-level training for youth and high school athletes — built by a former professional hockey strength coach.

  • Sprint & jump testing
  • Sport-specific programming
  • Injury prevention
  • In-season & off-season plans
  • All sports welcome
Enlist Now →

The Coach

Adam Oliver,
The Real Deal.

Adam didn't get his credentials from a weekend seminar. He earned a Bachelor's in Exercise Science from Norwich University, got his CSCS in 2018, and went straight to work at one of the most respected facilities in the country.

Three years at Mike Boyle Strength & Conditioning in Woburn, MA — the same place that shapes elite-level coaches. Then he brought that knowledge to Charleston and was named S&C Coach for the SC Stingrays hockey team.

Today he coaches adults, seniors, and student athletes across North Charleston with the same disciplined, evidence-based approach — adapted for where you are right now.

How It Works

Simple as Iron.

01
Free Consultation

A quick call with Adam — goals, history, limitations. No commitment, no pressure, no catch.

02
Full Assessment

FMS screening, fitness testing, baseline measurements. We know exactly where you're starting from.

03
Your Program

A custom plan built for your body, your goals, your schedule. Not borrowed from someone else's.

04
Do the Work

Show up, train hard, track progress. Adam adjusts your program so you never stop getting stronger.
